name: Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 large tomatoes, cored and slightly carved
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and lightly carve the tomatoes.
2. In a bowl, combine the cooked rices, olives, egg, onion, parsley, tomatoes, vinegar, oil, and mustard.
3. Season with creole mustard, salt, and pepper.
4. Place the Romaine lettuce on each salad plate as a base.
5. Fill the tomatoes with the salad mixture and place them on top of the greens.
6. Garnish with Parmesan cheese.
7. Serve at room temperature.
